---
title: "Delineating potential DRT operating areas: An origin–destination clustering approach"
description: "Hussein Mahfouz, Malcolm Morgan, Eva Heinen, and Robin Lovelace (2025). Delineating potential DRT operating areas: An origin–destination clustering approach. *Journal of Urban Mobility*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.urbmob.2025.100135"
date: "2025-12-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "mahfouz_drt_operating_2025"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Urban Mobility"
doi: "10.1016/j.urbmob.2025.100135"
publication-url: "https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2667091725000378"
authors:
  - "Hussein Mahfouz"
  - "Malcolm Morgan"
  - "Eva Heinen"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Urban Mobility
**Year:** 2025

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.urbmob.2025.100135) [Publisher Link](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2667091725000378) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Hussein Mahfouz, Malcolm Morgan, Eva Heinen, and Robin Lovelace (2025). Delineating potential DRT operating areas: An origin–destination clustering approach. *Journal of Urban Mobility*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.urbmob.2025.100135

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{mahfouz_drt_operating_2025,
  title = {Delineating potential DRT operating areas: An origin–destination clustering approach},
  author = {Mahfouz, Hussein and Morgan, Malcolm and Heinen, Eva and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2025-12},
  journaltitle = {Journal of Urban Mobility},
  volume = {8},
  issn = {2667-0917},
  doi = {10.1016/j.urbmob.2025.100135},
  url = {https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2667091725000378},
  pages = {100135},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
